name: First Northern Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Family-owned community bank since 1907 offering personal and business banking, mortgages, loans, and online services across 11 regional offices.
description_long:
First Northern Bank and Trust is an independent, family-owned financial institution founded in 1907 that operates as a traditional community bank. The company maintains deep roots in its local region with 11 convenient office locations, drive-up windows, and 24-hour ATMs serving greater community members. As an FDIC-insured institution backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, the bank provides deposit insurance protection for customer accounts.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including personal checking accounts, business checking accounts, mortgages (home purchase and refinance), consumer loans, certificates of deposit (CDs), online banking, mobile banking, remote deposit capture, merchant services, commercial mortgages, and business financing. Their digital services include bill payment, balance transfers, money transfers, and account management through both web and mobile platforms.

First Northern Bank and Trust distinguishes itself through its independent, family-owned structure, contrasting itself explicitly with "big, out-of-town banks." The company emphasizes relationship-based banking, local decision-making authority, and personal customer service as core differentiators. They position themselves as having deep understanding of the regional market and longstanding ties to local families and businesses, offering banking products tailored to specific customer needs.

The bank experienced a systems upgrade that temporarily affected online banking accuracy and ATM functionality as of March 18th. The company also actively warns customers about ongoing fraud schemes involving fraudulent communications impersonating First Northern Bank using fake logos and government seals, advising customers to verify any security-related communications by calling their official number (1-800-344-2274) before taking action. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with bill payment and fund transfers
Business financing and lines of credit
pros: FDIC-insured with full U.S. government backing on deposits
Family-owned and independent since 1907 with local decision-making authority
11 physical office locations with drive-up windows and 24-hour ATMs for in-person access
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app, online banking, and remote deposit capture
Relationship-based banking approach with personalized customer service
Diverse product suite including consumer loans, mortgages, business financing, and merchant services
Active fraud monitoring and customer protection warnings against scam attempts
cons: Recent systems upgrade caused temporary inaccuracies in account balances and limited ATM functionality
Limited geographic footprint (11 offices) compared to regional and national banks
Website does not display specific APR rates, fees, or product terms needed for rate comparison
No mention of special promotional rates or competitive advantages on specific products
Customers subject to ongoing fraud impersonation schemes targeting the bank

contact.address: 4Th Street And Lafayette Avenue, Palmerton, PA 18071

best_for: Local community residents and businesses seeking relationship-based banking with in-person service
Small business owners needing commercial checking, financing, and merchant services from a local lender
Customers preferring independent banks over large national institutions
Homebuyers and mortgage applicants wanting local underwriting and decision-making
diagnosis: First Northern Bank and Trust is best for individuals and small businesses in its service region seeking community banking with local decision-making and personal service. The main caveat is that as a regional bank with limited branch presence, it may not be suitable for customers requiring nationwide access or those outside its service area, and prospective customers should verify current rates and fees by contacting the bank directly.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 4Th Street And Lafayette Avenue, Palmerton, PA 18071
